name: git-tools
description: Git helpers for Claude Code. commit-push-sync: write changelog-ready Conventional Commits, sync local docs (CLAUDE.md + README) into the commit, optionally tag the push (opt-in), and (GitHub-only, with gh) cut a Release for that tag and sync repo description + topics. changelog-release: opt-in version bump + CHANGELOG.md generation from Conventional Commits (prefers changelogen).
